prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 21 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~6.2 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 62.3 kg; Height 177.9 cm; BMI 19.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 126/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.4%; 9 months ago 9.4%; 6 months ago 9.6%; 3 months ago 9.1%; current 8.2%), FPG (12 months ago 240mg/dL; 9 months ago 265mg/dL; 6 months ago 268mg/dL; 3 months ago 229mg/dL; current 174mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 58.9kg; 9 months ago 63.1kg; 6 months ago 63.2kg; 3 months ago 61.3kg; current 62.3kg), Height (12 months ago 177.9cm; 9 months ago 177.9cm; 6 months ago 177.9cm; 3 months ago 177.9cm; current 177.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 19.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 123mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 126mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 86U/L; 9 months ago 87U/L; 6 months ago 85U/L; 3 months ago 91U/L; current 88U/L), AST (12 months ago 94U/L; 9 months ago 84U/L; 6 months ago 85U/L; 3 months ago 91U/L; current 87U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; current 9mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 187mg/g; 9 months ago 207mg/g; 6 months ago 308mg/g; 3 months ago 338mg/g; current 295mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 83mg/dL; 9 months ago 82mg/dL; 6 months ago 77mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 163mg/dL; 9 months ago 165mg/dL; 6 months ago 181mg/dL; 3 months ago 166mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 9.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.71 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
